## Did you follow CONTRIBUTING.md?

- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`add-resource/...`, `fix-typo/...`, etc.)
- [ ] My commit messages are clear and use the imperative form
- [ ] My change does only what the issue asked for — no unrelated edits
